Chronology
2010 in KSW 2011 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki 2012 in KSW

The year 2011 was the eighth year in the history of the Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Poland. In 2011 Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki held 4 events beginning with, KSW Extra 2.

List of events

[edit]
# Event title Date Arena Location
1 KSW Extra 2 January 29, 2011 Hala MOSiR Elk, Poland
2 KSW 15: Contemporary Gladiators March 19, 2011 Hala Torwar Warsaw, Poland
3 KSW 16: Khalidov vs. Lindland May 21, 2011 Ergo Arena Gdańsk, Poland
4 KSW 17: Revenge November 26, 2011 Atlas Arena Łódź, Poland

KSW Extra 2[1] was a mixed martial arts event held on January 29, 2011, at the Hala MOSiR in Ełk, Poland.

KSW 15: Khalidov vs. Irvin

[edit]
KSW 15: Khalidov vs. Irvin
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateMarch 19, 2011
VenueHala Torwar
City Warsaw, Poland
Event chronology
KSW Extra 2 KSW 15: Khalidov vs. Irvin KSW 16

KSW 15: Khalidov vs. Irvin[2] was a mixed martial arts event held on March 19, 2011, at the Hala Torwar in Warsaw, Poland.

Results

[edit]
Fight Card
Weight Class Method Round Notes
Middleweight 84 kg Mamed Khalidov def. James Irvin Submission (Armbar) 1
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Rameau Thierry Sokoudjou def. Jan Błachowicz TKO (Retirement) 2 For the vacant KSW Light Heavyweight Championship.
Lightweight 70 kg Niko Puhakka def. Maciej Gorski Technical Submission (Arm-Triangle Choke) 2 Lightweight Tournament Final
Openweight 95 kg Toni Valtonen def. Lukasz Jurkowski Decision (Unanimous) 3
Heavyweight 120 kg Rogent Lloret def. Karol Bedorf Decision (Unanimous) 3
Middleweight 84 kg James Zikic def. Antoni Chmielewski Decision (Unanimous) 3
Middleweight 84 kg Michał Materla def. Gregory Babene Submission (Guillotine Choke) 2
Heavyweight 120 kg Marcin Rozalski def. Marcin Bartkiewicz TKO (Doctor Stoppage) 2
Welterweight 77 kg Aslambek Saidov def. Ruben Crawford Decision (Unanimous) 3 Welterweight Tournament Final

KSW 16: Khalidov vs. Lindland

[edit]

PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki

VenueErgo Arena
City Gdańsk, Poland
Event chronology
KSW 15 KSW 16: Khalidov vs. Lindland KSW 17

KSW 16: Khalidov vs. Lindland[3] was a mixed martial arts event held on May 21, 2011, at the Ergo Arena in Gdańsk, Poland.

Results

[edit]
Fight Card
Weight Class Method Round Notes
Middleweight 84 kg Mamed Khalidov def. Matt Lindland Submission (Guillotine Choke) 1

Heavyweight 120 kg Marcin Różalski def. Sergey Shemetov TKO (Arm Injury) 1

KSW 17: Revenge[4] was a mixed martial arts event held on April 1, 2011, at the Atlas Arena in Łódź, Poland.

Results

[edit]
Fight Card
Weight Class Method Round Notes
Middleweight 84 kg Mamed Khalidov def. Jesse Taylor Submission (Kneebar) 1
Openweight James Thompson Mariusz Pudzianowski No Contest 2
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Jan Błachowicz def. Rameau Thierry Sokoudjou (c) Decision (Unanimous) 3 For the KSW Light Heavyweight Championship.
Middleweight 84 kg Michał Materla def. Matt Horwich Decision (Unanimous) 3
Lightweight 70 kg Artur Sowiński def. Maciej Jewtuszko KO (Punches) 1
Middleweight 84 kg Antoni Chmielewski def. James Zikic Decision (Split - Extra round) 3
Welterweight 77 kg Aslambek Saidov def. Rafal Moks Decision (Majority) 2
